name: jinjaEditorWidget
title: Jinja Editor
subTitle: Write, evaluate, and debug Jinja templates from any dashboard or record detail page.

metadata.description: Embeds the FortiSOAR Jinja editor as a widget. Provide an input JSON payload, write a Jinja template against it, and render the result. On the View Panel, optionally seed the input with the current record so you can debug templates against real data.
